title: justicia divergens
intro: Justicia divergens, also known as Mexican honeysuckle or Justicia, is a perennial flowering plant native to Mexico and parts of Central America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues such as wounds, fever, and respiratory infections. The plant's leaves and flowers are rich in antioxidants and flavonoids, providing health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Justicia divergens can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine as a poultice or topical application to promote wound healing and reduce pain.
